	male_names = {

		# Sacres

		# Tardifs

	female_names = {

		# === CUSTOM FANTASY FEMALE NAMES ===
		# Imperiales

		# Archaiques
		name_volsa name_veturnilla name_fossina name_funebra name_cremona name_numeria name_apitora name_practilla name_sacrilla name_pulsara
		# Sacrees
		name_divina name_flamina name_sacriva name_fidelia name_lucida name_aeterina name_caelida name_nexida name_sanctilla name_auguria

		# Tardives

		name_belcora name_fontina name_silvana name_valdina name_luciana
	}

	dynasty_names = {
		Mortemari Nextorii Aeternii Caelarii Ossivarii

	lowborn = {
		Fossarius Murarius Ferranus Lignarius Textoris Fullanus Vinarius Pistorus
		Navarius Carbonus Silvanus Montanus Rupinus Fluminus Vallensis Campanus
